title: Astragalus bakeristrobilifer
taxonomy: Astragalus bakeristrobilifer is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Astragalus and is a member of the Fabales order. Within the Astragalus genus, it is further classified as a part of the subfamily Faboideae. Astragalus bakeristrobilifer is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the Fabaceae family.
